title: Report on the proposed subsidy to Teesside International Airport Limited
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to TVCA concerning the proposed subsidy to Teesside International Airport Limited.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of TVCA’s assessment of compliance of its proposed scheme with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed subsidy to Teesside International Airport Limited by Tees Valley Combined Authority case page. "
